May 2026 futures priced at $93-$95, confirming $95 level was reached
WSJ report corroborates WTI at $95 per barrel during this period
trades.bear_case: Ambiguity in resolution criteria — if 'hit LOW $95' requires a specific intraday tick at exactly $95.00 rather than trading near/at $95, outcome could differ; low volume ($100) may limit execution

Forecast for today is 39.35°C suggesting even hotter conditions
Early April upward temperature trend in North India makes cooling to exactly 36°C unlikely

Multiple independent sources use 'astronomical'/'massive' to describe projected sales
~100k pure sales + vinyl + streaming equivalents likely exceeds 150k total

Market closes today—this is essentially resolved, not a prediction
Would require an unusual 4%+ intraday crash to move below $80

trades.market: Will there be at least 2200 measles cases in the U.S. by April 30, 2026?
trades.research_summary: CDC data shows 1,575 confirmed measles cases as of March 26 (day 85 of 2026), averaging 18.5 cases/day. Simple linear extrapolation over remaining 35 days yields ~2,222 cases — clearing the 2,200 threshold. 16 active outbreaks with 94% outbreak-linked transmission indicate sustained case generation. Research brief characterizes YES as 'moderately likely,' dramatically above the 6% market price.
key_factors: Linear extrapolation of 18.5 cases/day average already clears 2,200 target by April 30
16 active outbreaks with sustained outbreak-associated transmission
2026 already tracking at 3x the 2025 daily case rate (worst since 2000)
CDC reporting lag may mean current count already higher than last reported 1,575
trades.bear_case: Sharp deceleration in daily case rate not captured in available data; public health interventions containing active outbreaks; seasonal decline in measles transmission already underway
trades.watch_reason: CDC reports 1,748 cases as of April 16 with 14 days remaining. Need 452 more cases in 14 days = ~32.3 cases/day required. Recent pace from March 26 to April 16 (21 days): 173 new cases = only 8.2 cases/day — a sharp deceleration from the earlier 18.5/day average. At this reduced ~8 cases/day rate, we'd reach only ~1,860 by April 30, well short of 2,200. The bear case of outbreak containment and deceleration appears to be materializing. Thesis is significantly weakened but not yet impossible — a new outbreak cluster could spike counts. Flagging for close next cycle if pace doesn't accelerate.

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Lucknow be 28°C or below on April 8?
trades.research_summary: Lucknow recorded 37.07°C high on April 4. The 28°C threshold requires a 9°C drop in daily highs within 4 days during peak April heating season. No weather system or forecast data in research suggests such an extreme cooling event. Lucknow April average highs are 36-39°C; sub-28°C highs are historically near-record territory.
key_factors: Current high 37.07°C is 9°C above the 28°C threshold — extraordinary drop needed
April is Lucknow's peak pre-monsoon heating season with average highs 36-39°C
No forecast evidence of incoming weather system capable of such extreme cooling
trades.bear_case: Severe Western Disturbance or unprecedented pre-monsoon storm system could suppress temps, and I previously lost a Lucknow weather bet on unexpected weather changes — but a 9°C drop in highs far exceeds typical weather-system cooling of 5-7°C

Trump obsessively focused on Iran - national address 5 days prior

Resolution bar extremely low - just needs to say the word once
Trump historically goes off-script and engages reporters at public events
trades.bear_case: Easter Egg Roll is a children's event; staff could successfully keep Trump on brief scripted remarks with no media Q&A, and Trump might deliberately avoid the topic at a family event

ECB policymaker Nagel confirms hike is 'an option'
Hormuz crisis creating energy inflation pressure forcing policy shift
Consensus of three hikes in 2026 implies April as starting point
trades.bear_case: ECB historically cautious on reversals; forecasts may be conditional on inflation data not yet published; other banks may disagree with Barclays/JPM

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Taipei be 31°C on April 10?
trades.research_summary: Taipei early April average high is 25-27°C. A 31°C high represents a 4-6°C anomaly (~2 standard deviations). Current conditions show precipitation and suppressed temperatures (~19°C), making extreme warmth less likely. Statistical probability of exactly 31°C is approximately 2.5-5% based on climatological temperature distributions.
key_factors: Taipei early April climatological average high is ~25-27°C; 31°C is a rare 2-sigma warm anomaly
Active precipitation pattern and cool current temps (~19°C) suppress likelihood of extreme warmth tomorrow
Even interpreting as ≥31°C rather than exact, historical probability is only ~3-5%; market at 26% is significantly overpriced
trades.bear_case: Unexpected warm air mass or rapid clearing could push temperatures above 30°C; resolution criteria interpretation may differ; April 2026 could have anomalous warming pattern not captured in climatology

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Seoul be 15°C on April 11?
trades.research_summary: Forecast for Seoul on April 11 shows a high of 17°C. At 02:54 UTC it is already 11:54 AM local time in Seoul, meaning the daily high is only 2-4 hours away and same-day forecasts are extremely accurate (±1°C). Historical average high for this date is 16.6°C. Both the forecast and climatology are 2°C above the required exact 15°C threshold.
key_factors: Specific same-day forecast of 17°C is 2°C above the 15°C threshold — too large a gap for typical forecast error
Already late morning in Seoul — remaining forecast uncertainty is minimal (±1°C at most)
Historical average of 16.6°C independently confirms temps above 15°C are typical for this date
Exact temperature match required makes YES resolution even less likely
trades.bear_case: Official weather station could record a lower reading than city-wide forecast if located in a cooler microclimate, or an unexpected cold front arrival could suppress the high, though both are very unlikely given the 2°C margin and same-day timing.

trades.market: Will the highest temperature in Buenos Aires be 25°C on April 12?
trades.research_summary: April climatological highs in Buenos Aires center around 20-22°C across multiple sources. 25°C sits ~3°C above the mean, placing it in the upper tail. Even with generous forecast assumptions (forecast of 25°C, ±2°C uncertainty), the probability of the high landing on exactly 25°C stays below 20%. Climatological calculation using N(22, 3.5²) yields ~8% for this exact temperature.
key_factors: April average high in Buenos Aires is 20-22°C; 25°C is a warm outlier
Exact integer temperature match has inherently low probability (~8-20% depending on forecast)
Research explicitly notes 32% odds 'appear somewhat generous' given data
Even best-case forecast scenario (mean=25°C) yields only ~20% exact-hit probability
trades.bear_case: No day-specific forecast available; if a warm air mass pushes forecast to 25-26°C, true probability could reach 18-22%, reducing edge below threshold

Historical base beat rate ~73-75% for US stocks
No specific Q1 2026 consensus data available to justify 86% beat pricing
Company still deeply unprofitable with negative EPS trajectory
trades.bear_case: Analysts may have dramatically lowered Q1 estimates post-miss, making a beat mechanically easier. $9,831 volume suggests informed traders may have better consensus data.

Market pricing hasn't caught up to completed result — classic informational lag

Crypto fat tails and potential liquidation cascades further increase downside probability.

Negative 24h momentum of -1.94% shows existing selling pressure
Crypto fat tails and liquidation cascade risk underpriced by market
NO trades historically 64% WR with strong P&L vs 47% for YES
12-24hr hold duration is strongest performing timeframe

trades.market: US x Iran permanent peace deal by May 15, 2026?
trades.research_summary: Negotiations active but only at 'one-page memo framework' stage. Core issues unresolved: enrichment duration gap (5yr vs 12-15yr), security guarantees, reparations. No diplomatic relations since 1979. JCPOA (nuclear-only) took 2+ years. Senate failed 6x on related legislation. 'Permanent peace deal' in 7 days is historically unprecedented.
key_factors: Permanent peace deals between longstanding adversaries never materialize in 7 days - JCPOA took 2+ years for just nuclear issues
Core substantive gaps remain: enrichment duration, security guarantees, reparations, Strait of Hormuz
Current progress is a one-page memo framework, not remotely close to a comprehensive permanent deal
Senate has failed 6 times to advance Iran War Powers Resolution, showing domestic political barriers
trades.bear_case: Trump could stage a dramatic announcement marketing an interim framework as a 'permanent peace deal' for political purposes, similar to North Korea summits

Fluxo W7M +1.5 covers regardless of whether they win or lose by only 1 game — they won outright
Market at exactly 50¢/50¢ signals stale odds not reflecting completed match

trades.market: Will Azerbaijan advance through the second Eurovision Semi-Final?
trades.research_summary: Eurovision semi-finals qualify ~10 of ~17 entries (55-60% base rate). Azerbaijan has historically been competitive (consistent qualifier 2008-2017, qualified 2019). Recent non-qualifications in 2018/2023/2024 justify a discount but not to single digits. At 9%, market prices Azerbaijan as near-certain elimination, which overstates the weakness even accounting for a poor recent streak.
key_factors: Base rate of ~55-60% qualification strongly contradicts 9% market price
Azerbaijan historically competitive with infrastructure and diaspora voting support
Even weak entries rarely fall below 20% qualification probability when 10/17 qualify
Best-performing category in my trading history (67% WR)
trades.bear_case: Song/performance may be genuinely among the weakest; $10K volume suggests informed Eurovision prediction community has priced in rehearsal quality and betting odds I cannot verify
